title: Anne's Survival
description: The modpack we use for Annes survival playthrough where when she dies a viewer gets invited to form a society.
body:
**This is the official modpack to play on Annes Survival server if you get an invite.**

everytime Anne dies she will invite a Twitch subscriber to the server.

This modpack gives you a vanilla experience with some optimization and extra craftable items.


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

> - Ferritcore
> - Entity Culling
> - BetterF3
> - Duplicate Pottery Sherds
> - 3D skin Layers
> - Better Statistics Screen
> - Bobby
> - Clumps
> - Connectible Chains
> - Craftable Elytra
> - Dark loading Screen
> - Female Gender Mod
> - Flashback
> - Honey Stickey Piston
> - Horse Armor Craft
> - Iris Shaders
> - Konkrete
> - MiniHUD
> - Not Enough Animations
> - Ping Wheel
> - Reese's Sodium Options
> - Show Me Your Skin!
> - Simple Voice Chat
> - Small Dripleaf Duplication
> - Sodium
> - Sodium Extra
> - Sound Physics Remastered
> - Tablist Health Indicator
> - Transfer Pet Owner
> - Voice Chat Interaction

</details>


<details>
<summary>DataPacks</summary>

<details>
<summary>VanillaTweaks</summary>
  
> - Armor Statues
> - Mini Blocks
> - More Mob Heads
> - Player Head Drops
> - Wandering Trades
> - Silence Mobs
> - Cauldron Concrete
> - Cauldron Mud
> - Double Shulker Shells
> - Dragon Drops
> - Fast Leaf Decay
> - Multiplayer Sleep
> - Anti Enderman Grief
> - Husks Drop Sand
> - Silk Touch Budding Amethyst
> - AFK Display


</details>




</details>



Please note.

That you freely can use this pack if you want to. Please go to changelog to see the recent updates of the pack

Thanks to all mod and datapack creators for making these and that we can included these in our own pack.
